Integra Markets
MCP API Log in

Commodity sentiment, real-time.

Integra ingests news, prediction markets, and positioning data across oil, gas, metals, and grains — then surfaces where the AI disagrees with the crowd. Available on iOS, dashboard, and REST API.

Log in Get API access Connect via Claude

Sentiment

Aggregated news sentiment scored across 17 curated commodity feeds. Rolling windows, top drivers, delta vs prior week.

Divergence

Where AI-implied probability disagrees with Kalshi + Polymarket pricing. Screen for high-conviction trade candidates.

Historical Archive

GDELT events, CFTC positioning, and World Bank price series back to 2020 — queryable via API + History tier.

MCP Connector

Access Integra directly from Claude Desktop or Claude Code. Ask questions in plain English, get structured answers.
